items.content_html: http-client.nvim is a Neovim plugin designed to help users quickly and easily send HTTP requests directly from within Neovim. The plugin supports multiple request formats and file uploads, offering developers a flexible and efficient way to manage HTTP interactions.
items.title: askfiy/http-client.nvim: http-client.nvim is a Neovim plugin designed to help users quickly and easily send HTTP requests directly from within Neovim.  The plugin supports multiple request formats and file uploads, offering developers a flexible and efficient way to manage HTTP interactions.

items.content_html: Hurl.nvim is a Neovim plugin designed to run HTTP requests directly from `.hurl` files. Elevate your API development workflow by executing and viewing responses without leaving your editor.
